description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and defines two stages: build and deploy. Add a build job that runs in the build stage, caches the node_modules/ directory, and executes the shell commands npm install and npm run build. Add a deploy_prod job that runs in the deploy stage, sets the environment name to production with URL http://argos.sh, is limited to the master branch, and runs the shell commands npm install and ./start.sh. Ensure the pipeline respects the only: master rule for the deploy job.
